findings.title: Hardcoded model name "gpt-4" in /tmp/pytest-of-runner/pytest-2/test_static_backend_runs_only_0/project/bad.py
findings.description: The model name "gpt-4" is hardcoded at line 1. Model names should be read from the configuration so they can be swapped without code changes.
findings.recommendation: Move the model name to the configuration file (e.g., audit_config.json) and reference it via the model/provider abstraction already present in ConfigManager.

findings.title: Hardcoded identifier 'project_id' at /tmp/pytest-of-runner/pytest-2/test_static_backend_runs_only_0/project/bad.py:2
findings.description: The variable 'project_id' is assigned a literal value 'acme' at line 2. Identifiers such as project_id, org_id, or tenant_id must not be hardcoded because they could inadvertently leak into LLM prompts or API calls.
findings.recommendation: Read this identifier from an environment variable or a dedicated secrets configuration. Never commit literal org/project IDs to source code.
